operator_class_int_ops: CREATE OPERATOR CLASS int_ops FOR TYPE int4 USING btree AS OPERATOR 1 <, OPERATOR 2 <=, OPERATOR 3 =, OPERATOR 4 >=, OPERATOR 5 >, FUNCTION 1 btint4cmp(int4, int4)
operator_family_integer_ops: CREATE OPERATOR FAMILY integer_ops USING btree
operator_family_my_ops: CREATE OPERATOR FAMILY my_ops USING btree
users_table: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER, name TEXT)
